programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Policía bueno, policía malo
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un marine aparece al otro lado del mundo, la investigación obliga a Ziva a desenterrar un capítulo enterrado de su vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Código de conducta
programme.desc: Cuando un marine conocido por sus bromas pesadas es encontrado muerto en la víspera de Halloween, el equipo del NCIS descubre que las bromas "inocentes" de la víctima pueden haber inspirado una venganza macabra.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fugitivos y consuelo
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato lleva a Gibbs y al equipo a hacer de consejero familiar de su antiguo mentor, Mike Franks, con la esperanza de evitar un sangriento conflicto internacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amigos en necesidad
programme.desc: Jamie y Danny difieren en cómo manejar a un novato imprudente del NYPD, Marcus, hijo de un amigo de Danny. Mientras tanto, Erin investiga una mala inversión en la que se vio envuelto su investigador, Anthony, por culpa de su primo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ciudad despiadada
programme.desc: Frank y Danny colaboran para ayudar a Nick Constantine, un exconvicto rehabilitado que Frank había encarcelado años atrás, cuando Constantine se ve implicado en el asesinato de un viejo enemigo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC ayuda a la hija periodista de Rossi, Joy (Amber Stevens West), a investigar la desaparición de una alumna de la universidad.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está persiguiendo a un sospechoso en Phoenix que está secuestrando víctimas con insomnio. Además, Hotch y García se enfrentan a la amenaza del grupo de sicarios clandestinos, llamados“La docena sucia.”

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de dos agentes encubiertos de la DEA y la desaparición de un tercero, el UAC se suma a la NSA para investigar si una red clandestina de drogas por Internet está involucrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que tal vez esté fascinado por inquietantes experimentos médicos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Apagón
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra literalmente a oscuras cuando la investigación sobre la muerte de un teniente se relaciona con un apagón en toda la ciudad.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a car with a loud exhaust admits he panicked and ran. A woman caught riding a stolen moped claims she borrowed it. A man is caught with a tool for deactivating security tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers subdue an erratic man on a public an armed dispute quickly spoils a birthday celebration and deputies help break up a volatile domestic situation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man who threatened his neighbors redirects his anger toward the deputies, and a driver in crisis puts the lives of others on the line.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A white-knuckled police chase ends in a dramatic escape and an unsettling officer injury. An intoxicated prowler is reported after a woman spots him in a tree. Officers bring in the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspicious van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest an uncooperative man with an outstanding warrant, discover marijuana paraphernalia during a traffic stop and investigate a dispute involving a pellet gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies search a suspicious vehicle behind a strip club. A man threatens to shoot employees at a car rental company. A man tosses lip balm filled with narcotics out the window during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The K-9 unit tracks down a man fleeing on foot, a father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son, and a former gang member is found with a stolen firearm.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man flees from Deputies with the hood up on a pickup truck. A suspect bails from a stolen truck and pretends he wasn't driving. A drunk driver is caught after a hit-and-run at a dance hall.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arguing with his father over money fights with three Deputies after an unsuccessful Taser deployment. A motorcycle runs from cops in Fontana. A suspect in Alameda County rams a patrol vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he's a good guy, and deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist leads officers on a high-speed chase, a dead car battery won't stop a man from eluding the police, and a wanted driver fails to avoid an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Multiple units pursue a stolen vehicle on the run. A woman tells officers her intoxicated boyfriend destroyed her mailbox then fled. A loaded shotgun is found in a vehicle after a brief pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver foot bails from a still-rolling van and hides nearby. A teen on a dirt bike refuses to stop for Deputies. A man attempts to run from a traffic stop but gets hung up on a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van. A confused man loses track of what’s in his pockets.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is confronted with new evidence while on the stand of a murder trial of a restaurant owner.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the starving death of a five-year-old boy. They discover the boy has siblings who are in danger too.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, for his final proficiency, has to determine how the Sherlock Holmes of a Sherlock Holmes club was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick looks into the murder of a man by someone who apparently needs a wheelchair. Nick looks into the murder of a woman in the subculture of the narcocorrido, songs about drug murders.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick, and Nick find the body of two women at a construction site buried under tar. The swing shift is brought into the world of foreign mail-order brides.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofia, Sara, and Greg investigate the disappearance of a woman coming home from a night out with a friend after her abandoned car is found on the edge of a highway.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a major Las Vegas player is found dead, Ecklie orders both teams to investigate the case. The man who had secrets on everyone in Vegas had a very big one of his own.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Warrick investigate a badly mutilated body in the woods. Grissom, Sarah, and Greg try to determine how a man was killed in a hotel room. It leads them to a convention of big women.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A serial killer strikes again, and the CSI team tries new technology using evidence from a prior killing.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Greg investigate a wildfire that killed one man and badly burned a woman. Catherine, Nick, and Warrick get the case of a family of three murdered in their home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: One night, four cases. Grissom and Brass get a stolen hummer and a taco stand. Warrick gets a dead car showgirl. Sara and Greg get a dead bodybuilder. Nick gets a dead boy found on a bench.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass travels to Hollywood, California to try to track down his estranged daughter's friend, meanwhile trying to rekindle some kind of relationship with her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a mental-hospital patient and quickly narrow down the suspects to a handful of other patients and staff members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man (Alan Rosenberg) whom Catherine flirted with at a bar reappears in her life as a suspect in a murder investigation of a woman who was shot and killed.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Gil Grissom es el supervisor del turno de noche de los investigadores de élite de la escena del crimen de Las Vegas. Holly Gribbs, recién salida de la academia, se une al equipo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Un hombre es asesinado después de haber ganado una fortuna y haber dejado a su novia. Entonces, Grissom, Nick y la recién llegada al equipo de CSI, Sara Sidle, investigan este caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a family vacation turns deadly, the CSIs must find the killer before the survivors take justice into their own hands.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An attempt on Calleigh's life puts both her professional and personal life in jeopardy. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Lifestyles of the rich and famous come under the microscope of Horatio and the CSI team when a wealthy family's nanny turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a rare and illegal machine gun vaporizes three weapons' smugglers, the CSIs must find the killer before the gun causes more deaths.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's ex, and Kyle's mother, resurfaces in Miami as a billionaire's widow who will do anything at all to get her son back.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a woman, the CSIs uncover a meth lab in her apartment and an unscrupulous FBI agent with a secret life of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a murder at a wedding, the clues eventually lead the CSI team to a local strip club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's past comes back to haunt him when Julia has him arrested for murder. The CSI team must investigate to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio deals with ghosts from his past, the team races against time to save Calleigh from a group of dangerous kidnappers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must act quickly to stop a vigilante who has been on a killing spree, targeting Internet predators.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body in a sinkhole leads Horatio and the CSI team to a robbery, while investigating they discover the target holds a shocking secret.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Alexx's son becomes a suspect in a murder, saving him has dire consequences. Horatio and the CSI team must act to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is killed due to a fake 911 call, Horatio must face off with a private investigator who is systematically destroying the team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When someone is determined to take down Horatio and the CSI team, Horatio puts his life on the line in order to save his team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una madre suburbana, el equipo de CSI descubre el oscuro pasado de su familia, mientras Delko continúa con su misión encubierta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando la exnovia de Horatio Caine muere en una explosión, el equipo busca dentro de su propio departamento para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie se burla del equipo de CSI dejándole pistas crípticas y cuanto más tarden en decodificar estos acertijos, mayor será la cantidad de muertos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI sufre la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos cuando un genio psicótico se descontrola en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una camarera en un club exclusivo, Horatio debe buscar en la lista de invitados más elitista de Miami para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Secuestran a una niña y el único testigo que tiene el equipo de CSI es un hombre ciego que oyó el secuestro, lo que lleva a Horatio a un viejo archienemigo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el asesino de la esposa de Horatio se fuga de la cárcel y causa disturbios, deben determinar qué es lo que busca y encontrarlo antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una estrella de telerrealidad, el equipo de CSI investiga al elenco, a los admiradores obsesionados y el pasado oculto de las estrellas para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre afirma haber soñado con un asesinato antes de que sucediera, Horatio debe enviar a Natalia de incógnito para que el equipo determine la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando explota una refinería de azúcar, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI hacen un descubrimiento impactante sobre uno de los empleados de la fábrica.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando un pescador escapa por poco de la muerte, el equipo de CSI tiene que esquivar las balas para mantenerlo con vida y descubrir quién lo persigue.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer embarazada es agredida, Horatio y el equipo luchan por ella y la vida de su bebé mientras rastrean a su atacante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando la investigación de un millonario muerto lleva al equipo de CSI a un servicio de citas de elite, Ryan se hace pasar por un empresario para exponer las mentiras del casamentero.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando el agua de una boca de incendios se lleva toda la evidencia de la escena del crimen, el equipo de CSI debe recrear un doble asesinato muy extraño.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Danny, and Flack investigate the death of a medical intern and an illegal organ trafficking ring at New York hospital.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A patient from a mental hospital, who masquerades as Superman, is found dead in an alleyway The CSIs retrace his steps to restore justice to the city.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When an anonymous caller tells Mac there is a dead body buried at Giant’s Stadium, evidence found at the scene points to one of the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a limo driver at a Kid Rock concert. With Kid as a leading suspect, the CSIs find themselves backstage.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young woman, dressed as a mermaid, is discovered floating in a bed of kelp. The CSIs search Manhattan for her murderer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A marine is found dead in Central Park. Across town, the team investigates the death of a woman found in a burned out car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a security guard is stabbed to death, Mac and Flack rush to the scene. While investigating the murder, a bomb is detonated.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two bungee jumpers witness a death on the Brooklyn Bridge, Mac and his new love interest Peyton Driscoll are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Holly Golightly look-alikes rob a jewelry store the detectives find themselves questioning the girls’ involvement in the world of blood diamonds.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate the death of a vodka spokeswoman dressed as an ice queen, and murdered with her scepter at a promotional event.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial murderer leaves his victims in coded t-shirts. The team struggles to decode his mythological clues and put their main suspect behind bars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay explore the worlds of goth and glam when a young girl that belongs to the underground “suicide girls” cult is found dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young hotel employee falls to her death from a hotel rooftop after she becomes embroiled in a deal with a scheming top model.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is summoned from a night at the opera to a bloody crime scene. Across town, a famous bachelor is found dead in his swim gym.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Cayó del cielo (S7 Ep5)
programme.desc: Un robo de joyas en el ático de uno de los abogados más poderosos de Nueva York da un giro extraño cuando el caso lleva al equipo de CSI a un hombre en la morgue.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: No salten pasos (S7 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York encuentra un cuerpo en un tejado y debe encontrar al asesino que está manipulando la escena del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Escondite (S7 Ep7)
programme.desc: Con un francotirador suelto en la ciudad de Nueva York, Mac debe revivir un caso de secuestro que podría haber creado uno de los enemigos más letales de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Muerta del susto (S7 Ep8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York pasa por acontecimientos espeluznantes después de que encuentran a una mujer a la que literalmente mataron de miedo.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Justificado (S7 Ep9)
programme.desc: Mac se enfrenta al subjefe de detectives cuando un oscuro secreto del pasado del jefe amenaza su reputación y a su familia.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Comprar hasta morir (S7 Ep10)
programme.desc: Mac y el equipo de CSI de Nueva York buscan al asesino de un gerente de una tienda de departamentos encontrado muerto en un escaparate navideño.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: ¿Con qué fin? (S7 Ep11)
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre disfrazado de payaso le dispara al dueño de una panadería, el equipo de CSI investiga y descubre una decisión del pasado de Flack que puede ponerlo en peligro.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Jaula (S7 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un promotor de un club español, el detective Mac Taylor debe enfrentar al jefe del laboratorio de criminalística de Barcelona para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Fiesta bajo el agua (S7 Ep13)
programme.desc: Cuando un camión articulado que lleva invitados a una fiesta termina misteriosamente en el fondo del río Hudson, el equipo de CSI debe exhumar los restos empapados.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Criminal con estilo (S7 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI rastrea a un asesino a sueldo afable y encantador, su investigación descubre una conspiración de consecuencias de gran alcance.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Justiciera (S7 Ep15)
programme.desc: Cuando un violador en serie es asesinado e inmovilizado de la misma manera que sus víctimas, el equipo de CSI sopesa el sentido de la justicia frente a su sentido del deber.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: El intocable (S7 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer obsesionada con conspiraciones, el equipo de CSI investiga y descubre que algunas de sus teorías pueden haber tenido algo de verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Hacer o morir (S7 Ep17)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un alumno popular en la escuela privada más elitista de Manhattan, el equipo de CSI se encuentra en el competitivo mundo de los más privilegiados.

programme.title: CSI: New York en español: Crisis de identidad (S7 Ep18)
programme.desc: Jo equilibra los desafíos personales y profesionales cuando su hija adoptiva, Ellie, es la testigo clave en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: Contracara

programme.title: Especialista

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico sólo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narco.

programme.title: Contracara

programme.title: Rambo II: la misión

programme.title: Ben-Hur (2016)
programme.desc: La novela épica de redención de Lew Wallace vuelve con esta conmovedora adaptación en la que un noble inculpado (Jack Huston) sobrevive a años de esclavitud para vengarse del amigo (Toby Kebbell) que lo traicionó. Coprotagonizada por Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Yo, Frankenstein

programme.title: Dora y la ciudad perdida

programme.title: Ben-Hur (2016)

programme.title: El huésped
programme.desc: Cuando un enemigo invisible amenaza a la humanidad al tomar los cuerpos de humanos y borrarles la mente, Melanie Stryder arriesga todo para proteger a la gente que más quiere.

programme.title: Cazador de cocodrilos

programme.title: Dora y la ciudad perdida

programme.title: Euroviaje
programme.desc: Europa nunca será la misma después de que Scotty Thomas y sus amigos aterrizan para vivir aventuras y excesos, haciendo las cosas más alocadas en el viaje más salvaje de sus vidas!

programme.title: Viaje censurado

programme.title: Cuatro bodas y un funeral

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el piloto?

programme.desc: La vida de un joven de 19 años en la ciudad de Guatemala es rutinaria y sin eventualidades, hasta que encuentra pasión, dolor y autorreflexión a través de una relación con un migrante caribeño.

programme.title: Viva
programme.desc: Jesus is a young hairdresser working at a Havana nightclub that showcases drag performers, who dreams of being a performer himself. But when his father has different expectations, the men struggle to understand one another and reconcile as a family.

programme.title: Bombal
programme.desc: Bombal narra la historia real de una de las mujeres más importantes de la literatura iberoamericana. Genial escritora y amante obsesiva, María Luisa Bombal logró por primera vez dar voz erótica literaria a la mujer.

programme.title: El crimen del padre Amaro
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: La distancia mas larga
programme.desc: El destino vincula irremediablemente a una abuela y su nieto. Aunque no se conocen forman parte de un círculo que no pueden romper. Las segundas oportunidades aparecen, pero la libertad individual se impone.

programme.title: Antes que cante el gallo
programme.desc: Carmín, una adolescente, sueña con mudarse a la ciudad con su madre, pero sus deseos se desvanecen cuando se muda a los Estados Unidos con su nuevo esposo en un pueblo de Puerto Rico y su abuela.

programme.title: Aqui Entre Nos (LAS)
programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.title: Wishmaster: el genio del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un apreciador de joyas recibe una gema antigua, sin saberlo, desata un espíritu inmortal que concede deseos a los humanos a cambio de sus almas.

programme.title: Las ruinas
programme.desc: "The Ruins" sigue a un grupo de amigos que se ven atrapados en una lucha brutal de supervivencia después de visitar una remota excavación arqueológica en la selva mexicana donde descubren un ser mortal entre las ruinas.

programme.title: Cementerio maldito
programme.desc: Basada en la aterradora novela de Stephen King. Después de que la familia Creed se muda a la zona rural de Maine, se topan con un antiguo cementerio con poderes siniestros.

programme.title: Juegos Diabólicos II
programme.desc: ¡Han vuelto! En esta aterradora secuela, la familia Freeling se muda a un nuevo hogar. Pero los espíritus de los muertos siguen obsesionados por llevarse a Carol Anne, la hija clarividente al más allá.

programme.title: El horror de Amityille
programme.desc: Una historia supuestamente real sobre George y Kathleen Lutze, cuya casa de sus sueños se convierte en una pesadilla. James Brolin y Margot Kidder son los insospechados nuevos inquilinos de una casa cuyos anteriores ocupantes habían sido asesinados

programme.title: Granja Macabra
programme.desc: El veterano actor Rory Calhoun interpreta el papel del endemoniado granjero Vincent en esta deliciosa y macabra historia de fantasmas que se ha convertido en un clásico de culto.

programme.title: Día de la madre
programme.desc: Rebecca DeMornay brinda una interpretación aterradora en este baño de sangre brutal. Cuando sus hijos entran a una casa y toman como rehenes a los dueños; ella les enseña cómo es la verdadera tortura. Coprotagonizada por Shawn Ashmore.

programme.title: The Shootist
programme.desc: Afflicted with a terminal illness, John Bernard Books, the last of the legendary gunfighters, quietly returns to Carson City for medical attention from his old friend Dr. Hostetler.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West
programme.desc: The epic story of a mysterious stranger with a harmonica who joins forces with a notorious desperado to protect a beautiful widow from a ruthless assassin working for the railroad.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: The Last Round-Up
programme.desc: Gene Autry is a cattle rancher determined to protect the interests of neighboring ranchers and Indians against unscrupulous land manipulators when local authorities plan to build an aqueduct.

programme.title: The Strawberry Roan
programme.desc: Gene’s first color film stars Champion in the title role as a wild outlaw stallion, branded a killer, and the two-fisted cowboy who fights off a gun-crazed posse to win justice for the noble animal.

programme.title: The Shootist
programme.desc: Afflicted with a terminal illness, John Bernard Books, the last of the legendary gunfighters, quietly returns to Carson City for medical attention from his old friend Dr. Hostetler.

programme.title: Canadian Pacific
programme.desc: A surveyor for the Canadian Pacific Railroad must fight fur trappers who oppose the building of the railroad by stirring up Indian rebellion.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Tough-as-nails career Marine Sergeant John Stryker is greatly disliked by the men of his squad, particularly the combat replacements, for the rigorous training he puts them through.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: Run Silent, Run Deep
programme.desc: The legendary Clark Gable and Burt Lancaster star in this gripping, classic military drama as a submarine commander (Gable) drives his men and his 1st officer (Lancaster) to the brink of mutiny in his quest to sink an enemy sub. Robert Wise directs.

programme.title: House On Haunted Hill
programme.desc: A millionaire offers $10,000 to five people who agree to be locked in a large, spooky, rented house overnight with him and his wife.

programme.title: The Haunted Palace
programme.desc: In 1765, a warlock is burned at the stake. Now, a century later, his great-great-grandson (Vincent Price) inherits the family mansion and falls under his ancestor's evil spell. And soon all the horrors of the past return to The Haunted Palace!

programme.title: The High and the Mighty
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Dan Roman, a veteran pilot haunted by a tragic past. Now relegated to second-incommand cockpit assignments, he finds himself scheduled on a routine Honolulu-to-San Francisco flight – one that takes a terrifying turn.

programme.title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter orders Pyle to take a week long furlough but instead of going back home to Mayberry, Pyle takes a civilian job on base so he can remain close to the Sergeant.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer's acts of kindness towards his new waitress friend is mistaken for romantic interest by her cruel Marine Sergeant boyfriend.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Grandma Pyle visits Gomer, reads his fortune and predicts Gomer will cause something bad to happen; then Sergeant Carter loses his voice while yelling at him.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: A Colonel and his young daughter are visiting Camp Henderson. While befriending the little girl, Pyle has no problem getting her and himself in trouble with everyone.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sgt. Carter is chosen to appear in a documentary but becomes an absurd camera hog, leaving producers no choice but to follow Gomer performing punishments Carter doles out.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: After a pay phone spits out $41.75 in coins, Duke and Frankie are ecstatic about all the fun they can have spending it, but good Samaritan Gomer is determined to return it to the phone company.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer wins a trip for two to Las Vegas and takes Sergeant Carter with him. The Sergeant has no money so he has to rely on Gomer for entertainment but Gomer has set an itinerary which include things like visiting a Rock Museum.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Opie Taylor runs away from Mayberry to join the Marines.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: A bet between sergeants and Sergeant Carter's lies result in Gomer dating Miss Camp Henderson and taking her to Lookout Point.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Both Gomer and Sergeant Carter are conned by an old bum.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter takes a temporary desk job writing training manuals and considers making it permanent when he sees the platoon does fine without him; so Gomer messes things up to bring the Sergeant back.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar become involved with Edward Villella when the former volunteers to play a role in the classic ballet ''Swan Lake".

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar decide to hold their own "decathlon" to determine who is in better physical condition.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix reveals how he destroyed his own marriage by trying to save Oscar's.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar share ownership of a new car, multiplying their differences.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix reveals, in a flashback, the hectic events leading up to Oscar's marriage when both were in the Army Reserve.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix directs a movie built around Oscar's day-by-day activities.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Bobby Riggs plays himself -- a male chauvinist hustler -- and Billie Jean King pops in as his ping-pong opponent, to the surprise of Felix and Oscar.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix finds a virago of a housekeeper to take care of Oscar while he is recuperating at home from an ulcer attack.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura recount vastly different versions of a marital spat that sends Rob storming out of the house.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob suspects that Buddy and Sally may be moonlighting for another comedy show or having an affair.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Ritchie claims he keeps being attacked by a giant woodpecker.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob begins to worry after neighbor Jerry suggests Rob's recent sneezing fits are psychosomatic expressions of repressed rage at Laura.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob feels that he has betrayed his dentist friend, Jerry Helper when he lets another dentist work on his teeth.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: While directing the annual variety show, Rob becomes frustrated by spousal jealousies as he tries to pair the perfect 'Cleopatra' to 'Mark Antony' for the lead roles.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: After a string of burglaries in the neighborhood, the Petrie home is pillaged. But the police are baffled as it happened.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura sees a weather girl as a threat to her marriage.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Bubba’s friend Lori admits to him that she has contracted HIV from a shady real estate agent, Bubba is set on having the man indicted for knowingly transmitting the virus. Then, suddenly, the man is found murdered and Lori is the prime suspect.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When mischievous Cowboy Habersham leads his buddies to a field to steal watermelons for a raucous party at a local lake, no one could predict that the night would end in the murder of Donnie Cole; a murder tangled in a web of infidelity and deceit.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sheriff Bill Gillespie's daughter Lana learns that her old flame, Lee Thompson, has arrived in Sparta and may be illegally running guns to a local hunting store owner, Raymond Mercer. He’s caught the attention of Lonnie Jamison, who fears the worst.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: While singing at her boyfriend Troy’s nightclub, LuAnn Corbin discovers that he is being forced by a shady drug dealer from his past, Brent Shaw, to use the club as a cover to sell Ecstasy. LuAnn is torn between love and her duty as an officer.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After Steve is injured in a fray with a gangster, Mike is demoted to walking a beat for insubordinately insisting on taking revenge.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A policewoman's son holds up taxicabs for a hobby that eventually results in the murder of an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A psychiatrist with an interest in exploiting his patient's criminal past complicates a rape-murder investigation.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The twelve-year-old daughter of a murdered mother goes after the killer.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Keller goes undercover at a mental hospital to uncover the truth about a string of mysterious deaths.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone and Keller investigate the death of a mob hit man tossed out of a window by his intended victim, a boxer who didn't throw a fight.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is invited to the home of Arthur Danford by an old friend, Barney Edmonds, who is managing Danford's campaign for governor of Hawaii.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix tries to help a woman suspected of murder when she kills an intruder in self-defense, who may have been blackmailing her.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix investigates the death of a woman on a ski slope and finds she was murdered because she was the wrong target of a kidnapping attempt.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix can't find the lady who he saw being attacked in her yard by 2 men, but he does find out that a woman was murdered there under the same scenario a year before.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mike Connors reprises his former role as tough-guy PI Joe Mannix, who gets assistance from Dr. Sloan to tackle an unsolved 1973 murder case.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist murders his estranged wife and frames a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Audrey is hired at One Eyed Jacks, but is caught in a trap when her father arrives. Cooper gets Jacques Renault to reveal the details of Laura's last night in the cabin. Deputy Andy saves Truman's life and apprehends Renault.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: A wounded Agent Cooper has a vision of a giant who gives him several clues about the murder of Laura Palmer. Shelly and Pete recover from the mill fire, but Josie and Catherine are missing.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Albert determines that neither Leo nor Jacques killed Laura, but he is unable find any leads into who shot Cooper. Cooper says they must find the third man, who he believes to be Bob, the gray-haired man.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A sultry but sinister pharmaceutical rep is dead set on winning the heart of the hospital's chief of staff.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A beach boy involved with a gang member's sister is a suspect in his murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A surgeon (Wayne Rogers) drops dead while he's operating on another doctor (Jack Klugman).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A pilot of an airliner carrying Dr. Sloan and Amanda to a medical conference in Europe is murdered.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The rangers help a Mexican security team protect a political candidate from an assassin.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The rangers help a Mexican security team protect a political candidate from an assassin.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Among the issues, Walker has to deal with including a new partner named Trivette, a group of men terrorizing a circus family who camps out at his home, and some bad guys who plan on the ultimate bank caper.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Unhappy with the rut she's gotten into, Naomi decides to make a change and arrives home with the news that, after seeing an ad in the paper, she's decided to attend school to train as a flight attendant.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vinton is chosen to play Santa at the Raytown Mall. However, with too much practice, he loses his voice! So Mama fills in the last second as Santa Claus.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama and Naomi's plan to find a date for Iola backfires when the date is more interested in Mama.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama is appalled when she finds a girlie magazine under Bubba's bed while cleaning. When it's revealed that Naomi sold it to him, Iola, Mama, Aunt Effie, and Pearl form MOP (Mothers Opposing Pornography), and set out to boycott.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al and Peggy plans and good intentions or their 25th wedding anniversary are upset.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Bundys' and D'Arcy's Caribbean cruise is ruined when the ship sinks.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: After the sinking of their cruise ship, the Bundys and D'Arcys are left to fend for themselves at sea.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Peggy is invited to play in a big bingo tournament; Al and his friends set out to choose 'No Ma'am's' new official beer.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Kelly discovers she has a wealthy, but young, secret admirer.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Bud volunteers for a computer sex experiment.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al's fraudulent lawsuit against the mall is jeopardized by his desire to win a bowling championship.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When Al and Peggy go to a basketball game, Peggy switches seats with Al and her seat is chosen for a $10,000 free throw contest.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: The Christmas Story
programme.desc: In an attempt to remind his family of the real meaning of Christmas, Jim decides the Anderson's will cut down their own Christmas tree this year.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Sparrow In The Window
programme.desc: When Kathy discovers an injured sparrow on the windowsill, the family takes the little bird in to nurse it back to health.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Boy's Week
programme.desc: After Kathy breaks another window, Jim is committed to teaching his kids about personal responsibility.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: A Friend Of Old George's
programme.desc: The family has a lovely dinner and special event planned for Kathy's birthday. She's been looking forward to it, but an uninvited visitor upsets the best-laid plans.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Bud The Snob
programme.desc: Bud is getting a reputation as a snob; his difficulty in talking with girls is being misinterpreted as standoffishness.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: The Promised Playhouse
programme.desc: Jim demands that his family start living up to the promises they've made to people.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Jim The Farmer
programme.desc: Feeling stressed out from all the pressure at work, Jim decides to give up his job, move to the country and become a farmer.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Father Of The Year
programme.desc: The Springfield newspaper is sponsoring a Father of the Year contest. The Anderson children set out to write the winning essay, but can't find the words to describe the “best father in the world.”

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Bill is scheduled to take Freddie out to dinner, but also has to go to the twins' open house at school. Bill takes Freddie to the school, and she just loves it. She starts to think she wants to have children of her own.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: A new family moves into the apartment building where the Davises live. Stanley is a child with a physical disability that hinders his walking. Buffy and Jody try to be friends with him at school.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Someone new moves into the apartment building where the Davises live, and it is a Broadway star. Buffy and Jody can't keep their eyes off her.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Bill goes to a party where there are famous people. He meets Carol Haven, a movie star. She takes an interest in Bill and they start dating. He considers proposing marriage.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: A dog follows Jody and Buffy home from school and they take it into the apartment. They hid the dog as long as they could until Mr. French finds the dog.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: The kid's Aunt Fran invites them and Uncle Bill to Terre Haute for a family reunion. Once there, it is clear Aunt Fran wants the kids to live with her. She tells them Uncle Bill does not have time for kids and they should stay with her.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: Mr. French considers opening a restaurant after his date starts questioning his life as a gentleman's gentleman.

programme.title: Galaxymphony Strikes Back
programme.desc: Get swept away by the amazing visuals and premium sound quality of classical masterpieces! Watch breathtaking orchestral performances, operas, and ballets. Experience the grandest, most popular classical musical productions filmed around the world.

programme.title: Chopin: Piano Concertos No. 1 & No. 2
programme.desc: Antoni Wit conducts the Warsaw Philharmonic Orchestra in performances of Chopin's Piano Concertos No. 1, Op. 11 and No. 2, Op. 21; soloists are Nikolai Demidenko and Evgeny Kissin.

programme.title: Faure's Requiem
programme.desc: Winchester Cathedral Orchestra and the English Chamber Choir perform the piece; host John Gielgud.

programme.title: Saint-Saëns: Piano Concerto No. 2, Op. 22
programme.desc: Pianist Mikhail Pletnev is accompanied by the Russian National Orchestra led by Kirill Karabits in a performance of Camille Saint-Saëns's Piano Concerto No. 2, Op. 22.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Descent Into the Maelstrom
programme.desc: In the 1980s, Philip Glass creates music for the Australian Dance Theatre based on "Descent into the Maelstrom" by Edgar Allan Poe.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight
programme.desc: Cinematic clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Classica Spotlight

programme.title: Beethoven - Symphony No. 9 in D Minor, Op. 125
programme.desc: Swiss conductor Philippe Jordan and the Orchestre de l'Opéra national de Paris recorded all of Ludwig van Beethoven's symphonies in 2014-2015. In this program, maestro Jordan presents Beethoven's final symphony: Symphony No. 9 in D minor, Op. 125.

programme.title: Grieg's Piano Concerto & Beethoven Symphony No. 7
programme.desc: Conductor Jan Latham-Koenig leads the Flanders Symphony Orchestra in a concert recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium; Felix Mendelssohn's concert overture Die Hebrides, Op. 26; Edvard Grieg's Piano Concerto in A minor, Op. 16.

programme.title: La Belle
programme.desc: A ballet in three acts by Jean-Christophe Maillot; music by Tchaikovsky.

programme.title: Schumann - Violin Concerto & Symphony No. 1
programme.desc: Violin Concerto in D minor, WoO 23, featuring Dutch violinist Isabelle van Keulen as the soloist; Symphony No. 1 in B-flat major, Op. 38. The concert recording is from Auditorium du Nouveau Siècle in Lille, France, on June 16, 2017.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pedido fatal
programme.desc: Un hombre es encontrado muerto en su casa y su ex esposa tiene una coartada perfecta. Para determinar la hora de la muerte, los investigadores deben saber cuándo comió la víctima por última vez.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Gayle Isleib, de 54 años, fue emboscada en su camino de entrada de Manchester, Connecticut, y asesinada a tiros. Ahora la policía debe determinar si el amor se convirtió en obsesión... y en un motivo de asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una noche con vientos en Kansas en 1995, un misterioso incendio arrasó con la casa de un doctor prominente. Entre los escombros, los investigadores encontraron evidencia que les dijo cómo comenzó el incendio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un saco de dormir desechado, que contiene zapatillas de deporte ensangrentadas y un bolso, lleva a la policía al cuerpo de una mujer joven.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vida cambia después de 20 años de haber transcurrido un crimen sin resolver, y lo mismo ocurre con la medicina forense. Hoy en día, un microscopio de alto poder y el perfil de ADN, revelan una pista que nadie había visto antes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de un rico empresario estadounidense fue encontrado en su auto de alquiler. Los dientes y fragmentos de huesos fueron los únicos restos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un brutal ataque a dos niños cerca de un estanque se basa en pruebas extraídas de las aguas turbias. Fue el primer caso en el que se utilizó evidencia de Diatomea (algas) para ubicar a un sospechoso en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trago de pecados
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva a un trío de asesinatos sin resolver que ocurrieron en Wichita Falls, Texas durante la década de 1980, detalla cómo un cuarto asesinato durante el mismo período le proporcionó a la policía más de lo que se dieron cuenta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de 13 años desapareció de su casa en Colorado y la única evidencia que dejó el secuestrador fueron tres huellas digitales en la cortina de una ventana.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, la oficial de la correccional de New York, Donna Payant, desapareció y luego fue encontrada en un vertedero. El médico forense no solo identificó la causa de la muerte, sino que también encontró una pista importante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se sospecha un juego sucio cuando Glenda Furch, una trabajadora de una fábrica de Fort Worth, desaparece después de completar su turno.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante seis años, un asesino en serie merodeó por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Lisa Manderach y su hija Devon dejaron su casa para ir de compras, pero no regresaron a la hora que se esperaba. El esposo de Lisa, Jimmy, llamó a la policía lleno de pánico para denunciar su desaparición y los dirigió a un centro comercial cercano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fiebre del oro
programme.desc: El despacho de emergencia recibió una llamada de un hombre que dijo que su novia se disparó y se suicidó. La autopsia reveló que la herida de bala no fue autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Por lo general, es fácil determinar cómo un criminal entró en la escena del crimen. Pero en este caso, estaba lejos de esclarecerse. Parecía que el asesino se desvaneció y quizá lo hizo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un niño de quince años muere a causa de una misteriosa herida de bala en la cabeza mientras está sentado en el vestíbulo del club de armas de su padre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Rompiendo el molde
programme.desc: El hijo de tres años de unos padres de Dripping Springs, Texas, desarrolla una condición respiratoria.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.desc: Roofie rape victim Darcy is barreling down a self-destructive path and only a handful of people know why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny and Jay’s faux-mance is working perfectly. But when Jay gets too serious, Manny reminds him it's all fake.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Manny discovers that her University demo reel is actually a sex tape that she and Jay made, her future hangs in the balance. By the time Jay catches up to her with the correct DVD, it's too late.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When cute and funny Rachel joins Peter, Danny & Derek’s MI group for their “How-To” video project, confidence is high.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s finally been granted a spot on Spirit Squad, and she’s ecstatic. But trying to be a normal teenager is proving a difficult balancing act.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is on her A game - she's excelling at work, Andrea's given her a raise, and she’s going to use the money to redesign her bedroom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Since Snake’s suspension from teaching, Emma’s life has been turned upside-down. He’s really in a funk, and the dark cloud over his head has fouled the air at home, where Emma finds herself caught in the no-man’s-land between her parents.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy finally gets the news he’s been waiting for – he’s been accepted into NYU! But he’s got other things on his mind. He is slowly discovering that he has other options when it comes to his real dream – walking again.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Anya’s first year running the Free The Children Freedom Fast to promote education and health in Africa. She has a lot to coordinate - which would be hard enough without meddling Holly J, who’s determined to make Anya choose between her and Sav.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s renewed relationship with Lucas is making her feel like she’s on top of the world. With the extra free time afforded by his help, she's taking on all the high school things her parenting has kept her from enjoying.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s world is rocked when Paige drops a bomb – her dad’s going to help her buy a condo. Ellie’s just learned she might be up for the editorship of the Core newspaper, so she’s distracted.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jimmy have just one more exam before they’re finally done school and, with Jimmy's help, Spinner's sure he can pass and enjoy his cancer-free future.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With time ticking towards the Class of ’07 Prom and Graduation ceremony, Liberty has the perfect night planned: a hotel prom, with the amazing Natasha Bedingfield performing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Relieved of parental duty for the year by mom, Mia starts the school year off with a bang by bonding with new girl, Leia, and getting scouted to be the new face of football star Tom Blakes’ shoe line.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia does what she can to ensure her success. Besides, Tom is handsome and famous, so Mia thinks being with Tom to get ahead isn’t such a bad trade.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane wants to play football but since there is no girls team, then boys’ football it is. The Shep doesn’t like the idea one bit, but once Jane proves she’s faster, stronger, and more athletic than most of the team, he relents…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eager to make the most of her college experience, Liberty jumps at the chance to rush the most popular sorority at Smithdale. Determined to get in, Liberty slowly exchanges old habits and old friends (Manny and Emma) for sorority approved ones.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter begins a relationship with Mia and a friendship with Riley. Finding a balance between a new girlfriend and a new guy friend gets confusing, especially when Riley is suddenly kissing Peter.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Sav and Anya plan to celebrate their six-month anniversary on the school’s overnight trip. Only problem? Alli, Sav’s sister, convinces their parents to let her go on the trip on the condition that Sav spends every second with her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s the star of Degrassi’s first-ever football game win! The Shep is floored at how much Riley’s improved.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare stands up for Connor when he receives unfair treatment from The Shep. The result of their peaceful protest? Detentions for everyone. No one is more frustrated by the detention than Alli. It wasn’t her idea to protest.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the sabre-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: The Maori struggled for survival 1,000 years ago in a New Zealand populated by giant birds.

programme.desc: Chris Packham is out to determine whether the Himalayan Yeti and the Sumatran Orang Pendek exist.

programme.title: The X-Creatures

programme.title: The X-Creatures

programme.title: The X-Creatures

programme.title: The X-Creatures

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham investigates whether the thylacine, aka Tasmanian tiger or Tasmanian wolf, has truly gone extinct. The species lived in Australia and Tasmania.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as Diplodocus was the immense Argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur

programme.desc: Cesar attempts to introduce Roscoe, an agoraphobic Akita who is too scared to leave the house and garden and has never been for a walk, to the outside world.

programme.desc: A Weimaraner eats everything in sight; a yellow Lab's excess energy is expressed destructively; an Australian shepherd is unable to socialize with other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A woman who has relinquished the role of pack leader to her Welsh Sealyham terrier; an English mastiff with too much energy; a Tibetan terrier who is a terror on walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Great Dane with an aggressive attitude; Cesar helps a shepherd mix recover from the issues developed while living in a hoarding situation so she can be rehomed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar adopts four puppies and films them living with him and his pack for their first eight months to demonstrate how to raise a balanced dog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive lab-mastiff mix; a Jack Russell mix that barks obsessively; a woman is concerned at her dog's habit of barking and growling at people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is too dedicated to its owner; a beagle mix lashes out at anyone who walks past; an Italian mastiff fears cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A puppy terrorizes its owner's cat; a spoiled Yorkshire terrier; a Rottweiler is aggressive toward strangers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Italian greyhound mix is possessive over bones and toys; a mastiff misbehaves outside; a Yorkshire terrier takes over her owner's morning routine.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again. So now the Dog, with a posse expanded to include his children and grandchildren, sets off on a hunt through the Colorado Rockies for Santa Claus himself!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a young man with a taste for trouble. He's fled to Texas but with his family's house on the line Dog is willing to try a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere, and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team go after Kandice, AKA Candy, AKA Suga, a stripper who didn't make her court appearance. They convince one of her friends to lure her to a supermarket parking lot, where Dog has an easy time fetching the fetching young thing. But then

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team. But they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam proposes marriage to Kirby, who intends to divorce Jeff; Tracy persuades Krystle to give her the company credit cards and confidential files; Peter makes a pass at Claudia; and Krystle and Blake are remarried.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A stranger greets little Danny by name; worried, Claudia moves the family into the mansion; Peter DeVilbis's architect hints at the playboy's drug problem; Kirby's hand swells uncontrollably.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby's health problems continue; Peter urges Fallon to try cocaine; Tracy sabotages Krystle at the office to gain Blake's favor; Allegre, the racehorse, is stolen; Claudia receives violets from her late husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake receives a ransom note for the return of his horse; Peter announces Fallon will be his wife; Dex and Alexis mix business with pleasure; Kirby suffers a seizure.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake grows suspicious of Peter DeVilbis; Claudia receives more violets from 'Lancelot'; Adam tells Blake the truth of the poisoning incident; after suffering a seizure, Kirby undergoes emergency surgery and loses her baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Allegre is returned, and Blake's suspicions about Peter's involvement are founded; Tracy orchestrates a press campaign to ruin Krystle; learning her fiancé has left the country, Fallon dashes from the hotel and is struck by a truck.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Peter DeVilbis, caught while trying to leave the country, is arrested for possession of drugs and jailed; Blake is offered a political post; Fallon regains consciousness and learns she is paralyzed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to bribe Kirby to prevent her from marrying Adam; Claudia receives another package from her late husband; Fallon remains unable to walk, until her child's life is in danger.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle learns she is pregnant; Fallon suffers from painful headaches; Claudia and Steven visit Matthew's accident site in Peru; once home, however, Claudia receives a phone call from her late husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis makes a plan to upset Blake's business deal with Rashid Ahmed; Tracy attempts to seduce Blake and is fired; Steven grows suspicious of Dex, who places a mysterious phone call to Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex finds Alexis with Rashid and turns to Tracy for comfort; learning the reasons behind her father's death, Kirby buys a gun; the mysterious caller turns out to be a tape-recorded message; Alexis moves ahead with her plan to ruin Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby learns the truth behind her father's suicide; Krystle tells a stunned Alexis of her pregnancy; Fallon and Jeff announce they will remarry. Blake is planning to attack a nation involved in the China Seas Deal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake travels to Hong Kong to patch up the China Seas oil deal and learns that Ahmed has left the country; Mark blackmails Alexis for $100,000, and McVane watches as he deposits the check; Kirby attempts to kill Alexis but is unsuccessful.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis thwarts Blake's loan extension; Sammy Jo arrives in Denver to see her son; after quarreling with Alexis, Mark is found dead after a fall from her balcony.
