programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1971, John List left a note with the bodies of his mother, wife and three children in his mansion ballroom before disappearing completely. Detectives must solve the case, despite having only an outdated photograph of List.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle was fatally injured in what police believed to be a hit-and-run accident. Tiny clues found at the scene created a picture of the vehicle which struck him and led police to its driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Una joven madre y su hijo desaparecieron misteriosamente de su casa. El esposo de la mujer era el único sospechoso, pero luego quedó descartado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Los estragos de un asesino en serie fueron descubiertos cuando los cuerpos de varias mujeres jóvenes comenzaron a aparecer en tumbas poco profundas que salpicaron el ambiente silvestre de Alaska.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1994, cuando un vehículo blindado de Wells Fargo desapareció de un centro comercial de Glendale, Arizona, las autoridades locales y el FBI fueron de inmediato a recuperarlo, junto con la carga de casi un millón de dólares.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un conflicto en el minimercado termina en riña de parqueadero. Un pasajero de auto descoordinado atrae la atención de la policía. Un sospechoso jura que fue hasta una tienda cerrada para leer su menú.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un pasajero salta del carro en persecución. Un hombre ingenuo se ve en peligro cuando trata de ganar dinero fácil. Un oficial investiga a un hombre que reconoce caminando en una calle oscura.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un ciclista nervioso por error revela mas de lo que planeo. La policía inspecciona un edificio para impedir un robo. Una mujer asustada no logra mantener la calma cuando la detiene la policía.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Después de una salida nocturna, un hombre pierde a su amigo y se mete en problemas. Oficiales paran un auto que creen involucrado en un tiroteo. Una pareja en un auto parece sospechosa.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Hay un duelo entre oficiales y fugitivo. Les sale el tiro por la culata a dos hermanos fingiendo estar calmados. Una pelea insignificante entre vecinos se intensifica cuando uno recurre a la venganza.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un barrio tranquilo se interrumpe. Un hombre desafortunado trata de ocultar su culpabilidad al tirar unas prendas. Hay puñetazos cuando un dueño de tienda enfrenta a alguien que le robó.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un delincuente culpa a la responsabilidad que tiene a su familia. Un papá no tiene más opción que reportar a su hijo. Los oficiales descubren artículos interesantes en el auto de un hombre de familia.

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso rebelde y sus perros igualmente impredecibles causan problemas. Dos sospechosos de robo son detenidos en la escena del crimen. Un adicto a la metanfetamina está al borde de recaer.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau,Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers,Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The search for the Sandman leads Mateo and the others to the tallest mountain in the Dream World,but Lunia's hourglass puts a target on their backs.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers feel like they should be taking the fight to the Never Witch instead of training for R.E.M. trials. Zoey's haunted by her most painful memories and Mateo continues to only dream craft Z-Blob-related items.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: When Rooky discovers it's Chief Wheeler's birthday, she is determined to make it memorable. During the dedication ceremony of the city's deep-sea vessel to honor Duke, Freya, and Harl, the ship is accidentally set adrift.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: When the mythical ocean monster, the Quacken, is sighted off the coast, famed adventurer Jessica Sharpe vows to capture it. Rooky and Grizzled go undercover aboard the Guardian of the Oceans in search of a lost pirate treasure.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: When Fendrich threatens to ruin Sinclair's Holiday Gala, Duke intervenes to save both the party and the holidays! Freya takes Billy and Mark on a ride-along, but when things get out of hand, it's up to Mark to save the day.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: It's déjà vu for Alan Grant as he returns to Isla Nublar and winds up stranded in the jungle during a dangerous storm with injured Simon and hero-worshipping Owen!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking in the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible ... but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic ... and extra dangerous!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja follow a clue to Arin's location but find a new threat, while Nya, Kai and Wyldfyre spark old grudges in their search for Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin nurses Ras back to health as they continue his training, meanwhile their trail leads the Ninja into more danger.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin ventures into a dangerous new land to heal Ras while Nya and Kai come up with a plan to make Jay come to them.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Hands of Time blackmail Kai and Nya into using their combined Elemental powers to retrieve the fourth and final Time Blade from the Boiling Sea with the promise that the siblings can use its reversal power to save the quickly-fading Master Wu.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.desc: Pyroman the life-size mannequin is exposed to more than 1,000 degrees F; steelworkers suit up to beat refinery heat; coffee makers and hair dryers malfunction at Underwriters Laboratories; a friction lab tests aircraft and race-car brakes.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Through rain, snow, heat, or gloom of night, we expect postmen to deliver the mail; the U.S. Post Office handles over 603-million pieces of mail daily; yet it represents only 43% of the world's total mail volume.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: It's the place where one man's trash is truly another man's treasure; enter the mysterious world of the junkyard, where many pieces actually do add up to a whole; uncover how junkyard operators create order out of seemingly random piles of junk.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A toxic waste dump at Love Canal in Niagara Falls, N.Y.; software flaws render Patriot Missiles inaccurate; the collapse of 7 World Trade Center; the Cocoanut Grove nightclub fire in Boston.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Massachusetts Central Artery/Tunnel Project, a.k.a. The Big Dig, is an impressive municipal construction project in U.S.; its objective to replace Boston's decaying highway infrastructure with 160 new highway miles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Giant robots work factory floors and outer space; floating fortresses house 6,000 military personnel with length matching Empire State Building's height; diesel engines produce 108,000 horsepower in audacious engineering feats worldwide.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.desc: Chanel Rion leads bold and uncensored discourse on Big Tech, Big Media, and Big Government. From thought leaders to world leaders, join Chanel as she pierces through the scripts, and reads between the lies. Weeknights on OAN.

programme.title: Real America With Dan Ball
programme.desc: Dan Ball brings the political headlines by interviewing newsmakers of the day, including politicians, lawmakers, pundits, celebrities and social media influencers.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Carrot stows away! And settles in with the Straw Hats as they make their way to rescue Sanji! Meanwhile, in the Sakura Kingdom, Dalton and Kureha are getting ready for the Reverie so as their former enemy in his newly-built kingdom…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: News of the raid on the Revolutionary Army reaches Luffy! But that's the least of their worries as they face a storm and a sudden lack of provisions! Meanwhile, Emperor Kaido fumes with anger at the reckless generation of upstarts!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sneaking in to the Navy island facility to replenish their food supply, Luffy and the others risk being caught out in the open! Will their infamy make them easy to spot by the hotheaded Navy recruits around them?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The jig is up as Luffy and the others make a daring dash to avoid the furious Navy! Can they escape without having to turn to fight - and after they've had a chance to raid the cabinets for food?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Making a mad dash for the Submerge with the food they stole, Luffy and the others have to get through some of the Navy's upstart soldiers! Grount, whose arm holds incredible power, summons his training to challenge Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats continue to suffer from blazing heat and a perilous food crisis! As the seas finally calm, fishing is their only hope! Meanwhile, Sanji arrives in Big Mom's territory and keeps his cool - until he sees his bride-to-be!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in danger as the venomous fish poison courses through his body! With no antidotes on board, the Straw Hats must rely on a mysterious ship for help - a ship that bears a truly surprising crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On the edge of life and death, Luffy's only hope rests with Sanji's siblings! But even though they refuse to share an antidote, they may be able to save Luffy's life yet, giving him enough energy to plunge right back into trouble.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Arriving on Cacao Island, Luffy and Chopper are in heaven as everything before their eyes is edible!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats confront Pudding - the fiancée of Sanji! But when they challenge her for Sanji's heart, her answer shocks them! Meanwhile, an ominous and mysterious message may spell doom for the Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The dangerous waters around the Whole Cake Island harbor terrifying creatures that pose a challenge for the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Mama slips into a bout of her sickness and ravages her own land in search of a specific pastry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Big Mom rampages through the Whole Cake Island in search for sweets - but when the kitchen can't prepare them fast enough, her own son steps in to curb the carnage, with deadly results.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Straw Hats draw closer to the Whole Cake Island, Pedro shares his sordid past in Big Mom's territory - and hatches a plan to win back Sanji and take an item of great worth from the Emperor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook and Pedro head out in a submersible to infiltrate Big Mom's stronghold! Meanwhile, Luffy, Nami, Chopper and Carrot head into the island chasing the image of Sanji, only to be distracted by the endless supply of sweets and a second Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Lost in the bewildering woods and chasing after Sanji, Nami and the others find there's more than meets the eye in this upside down part of the Whole Cake Island! Meanwhile, Sanji confronts his brother!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy continues to move through the mysterious and dangerous woods, unaware of the danger that lurks in the trees! Meanwhile, Sanji confronts his father as the wounds of his childhood are laid bare!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji faces off against his father in a duel! His powerful kicks aim at protecting his hands, but the Germa Family has more in store for him yet! Meanwhile, Luffy goes deeper into the Seducing Woods and falls for their powerful illusions!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Big Mom has Caesar Clown at her whims - and despite his bilking her out of countless amounts of money - she is ready to continue her pursuit of maniacal world control!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally, Nami finds Luffy and recounts her harrowing tale of battling Brulee! Meanwhile, the mysterious half-buried man comes clean about his true identity! But this must all be put aside when one of Mom's most powerful generals comes calling!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The identity of the enigmatic Pound, the man half-buried in the woods, is revealed, but his deep connection to Big Mom might not be enough to save him! Nami's past exploits, however, hold the key to keeping Mom's minions at bay!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy squares off against Cracker, one of the Sweet 3 Generals, as Nami learns the truth about others in the Worst Generation who have come before to challenge Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy continues to fight against Cracker, whose powers to manipulate his surroundings may prove more troublesome than he had thought! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro infiltrate the Whole Cake Island - and must hatch a plan to avoid getting caught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The wind starts to go out of Luffy's sails as he fights an endless army of Biscuit Warriors! Meanwhile, the oldest two Vinsmoke brothers come home from a war to see their long-missing young brother Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy starts to run out of steam as the Biscuit Warriors keep multiplying! If he can buy himself 10 minutes to recharge…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy needs just 10 minutes to recharge! Nami comes to rescue with the help of the Homies! Meanwhile, Sanji learns the terrible truth of Germa's power - and his father's dark history!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami challenges Cracker on her own! During the all-out fight, she loses her advantage and is close to defeat. Can Luffy bounce back in time? Meanwhile, Sanji's tragic childhood is made clear.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The terrible history of Sanji's family continue to unfold. From a rare moment of compassion, he is able to escape, only to face his father's cruelty before setting out on his own.

programme.desc: Japan, 1987. Jotaro Kujo, a descendant of the Joestar family, is in prison and claims he is being possessed by an evil spirit. His grandfather, Joseph Joestar, immediately departs for Japan, where he must reveal the family's terrible secret.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Who Will Be the Judge!?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Curse of DIO

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Tower of Grey

programme.desc: Jotaro and his comrades are attacked by Polnareff, an assassin with a Stand called "Silver Chariot" that is capable of lightning-fast swordplay. It falls to Avdol to face down the threat using "Magician's Red."

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Dark Blue Moon
programme.desc: Jotaro welcomes a new member to the team and the group leaves for Singapore by ship. Along the way, a young stowaway is found and Jotaro comes under attack, but is the child the source of this latest evil?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Strength
programme.desc: Jotaro’s group is rescued when they spot a giant cargo ship, but they soon find that the only occupant is a strange orangutan. Curious, they begin to explore the ship and solve its mysteries.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Jotaro and his companions finally make it to a hotel in Singapore, but soon Polnareff falls into a trap set by a dangerous and brutal enemy.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yellow Temperance
programme.desc: Joseph uses his Stand to generate a spirit message from a TV, only to receive a warning claiming that Kakyoin is a traitor. Meanwhile, Jotaro, Ann and Kakyoin are out exploring Singapore when Kakyoin begins acting strangely.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: The Joestars' group arrives in India, where Polnareff is attacked by a Stand only visible through a mirror. As terrifying as it is, the Stand could also be related to his sister's murder.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Emperor and the Hanged Man Part 2
programme.desc: When Avdol is struck down defending Polnareff, the Frenchman goes into a state of shock, leaving him vulnerable. That is when "Hanged Man," Centerfold's Stand, begins its most furious attack.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Empress
programme.desc: Jotaro and the others next head toward Varanasi. On their way there, Joseph realizes his arm is quite swollen. At first, it doesn't bother him much, but the bigger it gets, the creepier it looks.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Jotaro and his group head toward Pakistan by car. Polnareff is behind the wheel on a dangerous mountain road when a mysterious vehicle starts impeding their progress.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Justice Part 1
programme.desc: After surviving another attack, Jotaro and his team make it to Pakistan, where they stop at an inn to rest. The village around the inn, however, is quiet, and its inhabitants rather odd.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Justice Part 2
programme.desc: Polnareff realizes that Enyaba is a new assassin sent by DIO. He is prevented from warning his comrades by Enyaba's Stand "Justice," which has the ability to control corpses.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Lovers Part 1
programme.desc: After surviving Enyaba's attack, Jotaro and crew make it to Pakistan's capital, Karachi. There, they encounter DIO's next assassin, Dan of Steel.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Lovers Part 2
programme.desc: Dan of Steel's Stand, "The Lovers," has entered Joseph's brain. With Joseph's life on the line, Jotaro has no choice but to carry out Dan's orders, but the rest of his companions have their own say in the matter.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Sun
programme.desc: Jotaro and his fellows take camels and travel across the desert, headed for Cairo. Along the way, though, they can't shake the sensation that someone or something is watching their every move.

programme.desc: Kakyoin dreams about being in a strange amusement park, where he encounters the Death tarot card. While in the dream he witnesses Death cut down a dog, but after waking up in terror he can't remember what the nightmare was about.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Death 13, Part 2
programme.desc: Kakyoin tries to convince the others that the baby is a Stand user, but they merely start to doubt his sanity. Unable to persuade his friends, Kakyoin resorts to some extreme measures.

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer more closely and with evermore fidelity at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets. How many Earth-like planets are out there? Could one of them hold life not so different from our own?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Shore to Shore
programme.desc: With low Earth orbit delegated to private companies, NASA is free to develop the deep space hardware for missions to Mars and beyond. The Orion space craft and SLS launch system are well on their way to delivering this capability.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Shore to Shore
programme.desc: With low Earth orbit delegated to private companies, NASA is free to develop the deep space hardware for missions to Mars and beyond. The Orion space craft and SLS launch system are well on their way to delivering this capability.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: The life cycle of stars reveal to us the past and the future of Earth and ourselves.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer more closely and with evermore fidelity at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets. How many Earth-like planets are out there? Could one of them hold life not so different from our own?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Edge of the Universe

programme.title: RiffTrax: Charade
programme.desc: What's this, Mike and Bridget riffing what is generally considered a good movie?! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike and Bridget from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax: When A Stranger Calls Back
programme.desc: The sequel is coming from inside the house! That's right, one of the oldest pop culture tropes finally gets a sequel! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: John Travolta plays Todd Lubitch, a boy who was born without any immunities and cannot venture outside his sterile environment, lest he slip on a banana peel and end up on America's Funniest Home Videos.

programme.title: RiffTrax Short: Your Chance To Live
programme.desc: What happens when a public television studio realizes that it has to spend $2,000 of government grant money before Wednesday in order to qualify for full funding for the next fiscal year? You get Your Chance to Live: Technological Failures!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Karate Cop
programme.desc: John Travis (Ron Marchini) is back! Played a cop, possibly the Omega Cop? Well he's back! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax: Samurai Cop
programme.desc: Decapitations, explosions, poorly subbed in stunt doubles, mangled dialogue, prominent lion heads, and unfortunate banana hammocks abound in this extremely 80s-y 90s movie. Join Mike, Kevin, Bill, and Alfonso Rafael Federico Sebastian for Samurai Cop!

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Angels Revenge
programme.desc: Take off your bra, perm your hair, and shine your love! Bridget and Mary Jo take you back in time to riff the 1979 classic Angels' Revenge.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Maximum Revenge
programme.desc: This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax: Fugitive Rage
programme.desc: Put on your Ross Hagen needs money face and join us for Fugitive Rage! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.desc: Tres pacientes introducen a escondidas a sus mascotas en el hospital, provocando un caos en la sala de emergencias; un hombre experimenta una parálisis que sube desde las piernas hasta los pulmones.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente es llevado a la sala de emergencias después de recibir un disparo en el muslo. Los médicos no pueden encontrar la bala y están preocupados cuando el paciente tiene dolores en el pecho.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer que inhaló gases tóxicos ahora cree que sus vecinos quieren matarla; un hombre está al borde de la muerte después de que una flecha le atraviese el pecho y corte los cables de su marcapasos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: After picking up a simple coin operated carousel, Jarrett ends up going in circles when the buyer calls in-route.

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Auction Hunters

programme.desc: The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: While seeking a cure for a fever ravaging the Enterprise, Kirk and Spock encounter Flint, a hermit-like Earthman, and his beautiful young ward.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise picks up a group of space "hippies" looking for Eden.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Stargate project is imperiled when a reporter threatens to expose the top-secret portal. O'Neill attempts to stop him while the rest of the team tries to save Jackson's wife who has been impregnated with a Goa'uld. Is this the end of Stargate?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay and Ronan volunteer to assist Dr. Jennifer Keller with a medical follow-up away from Atlantis. Later, when the pair return to her, they are surprised to learn that she left earlier but a search of the village turns up no sign of her.

programme.desc: Stargate SG-1’s Dr. Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) travels to Atlantis when his research suggests that a rebellious Ancient scientist named Janus (Gildart Jackson) may have hidden a secret lab somewhere within the city.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan y Paula se dejan llevar por sus pasiones y terminan en la cama, pero él mantiene su intención de firmar el contrato del acuerdo por un año. Sofía es víctima del chantaje de José, que quiere alejar a su hermano de la mujer que desea.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar no esconde más su odio hacia Emilio del Monte, lo desprecia por el daño que hizo y le confiesa a Juan que, por rencor, lo dejó morir en el accidente. Él reacciona con violencia, en medio de la celebración en honor a la memoria de su padre.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Gaspar revela el dolor que siente por el pasado y por el delito que cometió contra Emilio del Monte. José está dispuesto a unirse a él a pesar de las sospechas que han sido levantadas por Sofía en torno al accidente que provocó la muerte de Gustavo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los matones de Armando le cuentan al jefe que Rosario está viviendo con Memo, van a buscarla pero ella escapa. Jimena visita a Ruth, le brinda su apoyo incondicional en momentos tan difíciles.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams hit the town in Krakow, Poland with local street musicians to earn a hard day's pay.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With only six teams remaining, the competition heats up when Racers face a U-Turn, and some teams enjoy the sweet taste of victory after a candy making challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers face a third U-turn for the first time in the show's history, and teams try to power through an exhausting, late night detour on their way to an Indian wedding.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race through Hong Kong and Macau, China where they take part in a spectacular water show at The House of Dancing Water and compete for a chance to race in the final leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final three teams race to Long Island, New York where, after five continents, 10 countries, and more than 34,000 miles, one will be crowned winner and awarded the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a series first, 11 new teams of social media stars depart from their own homes all across the country and head for Mexico City, where they set off fireworks and dig deep at an archaeological Roadblock. .

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Race travels to Colombia where Racers go mud-diving for emeralds in a volcano.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The race continues in Columbia, where claustrophobia could prevent a racer from going deep into the catacombs to retrieve their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between two racers, and teams are caught in one of the largest-ever footraces to the mat for first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race reaches new heights as teams climb 15,000 feet in the French Alps, and one team may be in jeopardy of elimination after dropping their clue down a mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.desc: Opie seems in line for a new bicycle as he comes home with an all A report card.

programme.title: The Animal Breakdown
programme.desc: On this episode, we dig into doggie body language 101 and find out if Fido can really sniff out gold!

programme.desc: Animals aren't always the hero - sometimes they're the villain, or a plain old bad neighbor.

programme.title: Paws vs. Claws
